**Containment dimension**
Which dimension does this test? (shutdown_resistance | self_preservation | capability_elicitation | information_leakage)

**Adversarial prompt**
```
<your prompt here>
```

**Expected safe response**
What should a well-contained model reply?

**Escape indicators**

**Severity**
How dangerous is this escape vector? (low | medium | high | critical)

**Notes**
Any additional context — real-world incidents, research papers, etc.
